case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES (JUL-23-2024 COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER) PAID BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
